# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Remediated the PR-watch line-comment watermark gap in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs`. The real `ProcessPrToolPort::pr_status` now populates `latest_push_at` from the current PR head commit's GitHub GraphQL `pushedDate`, with current-head timeline push events as a fallback, instead of leaving it unset and relying only on head-SHA comment matching. Bot line comments created after the current head was pushed now block auto-merge even when GitHub anchors them to an older commit. Added regression coverage for GraphQL pushedDate filtering, force-push timeline fallback, and rejecting commit authored/committed timestamps as push-time substitutes.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree still contains unrelated `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/run.json` modifications outside the requested source-review scope; I did not modify them."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspect the pending amendment and existing PR-watch state
